title: Define OLE Container Properties
text: Define OLE Container Properties Define an OLE container widget to hold an embedded or linked OLE object. This widget allows you to integrate OLE objects, such as bitmap images, .wav files, and Microsoft Excel spreadsheets, into Uniface applications. For more information, see uOleContainer (OleContainer) . How to Setting Widget Properties Related Links Widgets In Uniface, widgets are user interface controls. They can display data values, control how values are modified, and determine the appearance of those objects. Most widgets are field-level widgets. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
